org.w3c.dom.events/Event/preventDefault.name: preventDefault
org.w3c.dom.events/Event/preventDefault.description:
If an event is cancelable, thepreventDefaultmethod is
used to signify that the event is to be canceled, meaning any default
action normally taken by the implementation as a result of the event
will not occur.
